project_type: Phaser 3 + Vite + TypeScript browser game (side-scrolling support survival)
build_system: Vite 8 with tsc for type-checking. No linter configured. verbatimModuleSyntax requires `import type` for type-only imports.
test_framework: None - no test files exist. Validation is build + manual gameplay.
build_command: cd /projects/sandbox/48hourchallenge && npx tsc --noEmit && npx vite build
verification_instructions: 1. Run `npx tsc --noEmit` to verify no type errors. 2. Run `npx vite build` to verify bundling succeeds. 3. Gameplay verification is manual.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full npm access available. No test framework. No Docker needed. TypeScript strict mode with noUnusedLocals, noUnusedParameters, verbatimModuleSyntax.
contribution_requirements: Never rename setState to transitionTo (Phaser Container conflict). Use `declare body:` not `body!:`. Use `(scene.physics.add.existing as (go: Phaser.GameObjects.Container) => void)(this)` cast pattern. All type-only imports must use `import type`. EventBus is singleton from src/events.ts. GROUND_Y=520 is ground line. Characters draw UPWARD from y=0 in local space.
key_patterns: Entity pattern: extend Phaser.GameObjects.Container, declare body, createVisual/drawShape for art, transitionTo for state changes. Events via EventBus singleton. All balance values in BALANCE object in constants.ts. Wave definitions in data/waves.ts. Game scene resolves abilities, manages game state, and runs the update loop. UI scene is a separate overlay scene for HUD.
directory_structure: src/ contains all source. entities/ has Player, Teammate (base), Enemy (base) plus archetypes/ (Solo, ADC, Mid, Jungler) and enemies/ (Grunt, Harasser, Assassin). systems/ has WaveSystem, ShineSystem, XPSystem. scenes/ has Boot, MainMenu, Game, UI, LevelUp, GameOver. data/ has waves.ts and upgrades.ts. constants.ts has all tuning values.
